postsLimit.description: Max number of posts to fetch (1-200)

onlyPostsNewerThan.description: Only return posts published on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

onlyPostsOlderThan.description: Only return posts published on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

commentsLimit.description: Max comments to fetch per post (0 = no comments). Comments cost extra results — keep low.

cacheMedia.description: Download thumbnails to local cache so historical runs render after Apify URLs expire (typically a few hours). Adds ~1-3s per item.
